info.title: SynApps Orchestrator
info.description: Visual AI workflow builder API. Connect specialized AI agent nodes, execute workflows in real-time, and manage LLM provider integrations. Authenticate via JWT bearer tokens or API keys.

post.description: Register a new user account and receive JWT tokens.
Authenticate with email/password and receive JWT tokens.
Rotate a refresh token and receive a new access/refresh pair.
Revoke a refresh token (log out).

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile.

post.description: Create an API key for X-API-Key header authentication.

get.description: List active API keys for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Revoke a user API key.

get.description: List all registered applets with their metadata (paginated).
List supported LLM providers and model catalogs.
List supported image generation providers and model catalogs.
List all auto-discovered LLM providers with capabilities and status.
Run a health check on a specific discovered provider.

Run health probes on all connectors and return per-connector status.

Each connector is probed with a lightweight HTTP HEAD ping (5 s timeout).
Results are cached for 30 s to avoid hammering upstream on every request.

Dashboard statuses follow these thresholds:
- *healthy*:  avg latency < 500 ms AND 0 errors in last 5 min
- *degraded*: avg latency < 2000 ms OR < 5 errors in last 5 min
- *down*:     timeout OR ≥ 5 errors in last 5 min

post.description: Probe a single connector and return its health state.
Dry-run validation of a template/flow definition without execution.

get.description: List recent webhook debug entries, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Webhook Debug Entries Api V1 Webhooks Debug Get

delete.description: Clear all webhook debug entries.

get.description: Get a single webhook debug entry by ID.

schema.title: Response Get Webhook Debug Entry Api V1 Webhooks Debug  Entry Id  Get

post.description:
Retry a webhook delivery by re-sending the original payload.

Increments retry_count and updates last_retry_at on the entry.
Re-invokes the same flow with the original body.

schema.title: Response Retry Webhook Debug Entry Api V1 Webhooks Debug  Entry Id  Retry Post

post.description: Register a new webhook for event delivery.

get.description: List all registered webhooks (secrets are not returned).

delete.description: Delete a webhook by ID.

post.description:
Register a new inbound webhook trigger tied to a flow.

Returns a trigger record with an ``id`` that forms the unique receive URL:
``POST /api/v1/webhook-triggers/{id}/receive``.
Secrets are stored encrypted and never returned in subsequent calls.

get.description: List all registered inbound webhook triggers (secrets not returned).
Get a single webhook trigger by ID (secret not returned).

delete.description: Delete a webhook trigger by ID.

post.description:
Receive an inbound webhook and trigger the associated flow.

No session auth is required — the caller is authenticated via HMAC-SHA256
signature when a secret is configured on the trigger.  Unsigned requests
are accepted only when the trigger has no secret.

The raw request body is passed as the flow's ``input`` dict under the key
``payload``.  If the body is valid JSON it is inlined directly; otherwise
it is wrapped as ``{"raw": "<body_text>"}``.

Register a new cron schedule for a flow.

The ``cron_expr`` field accepts standard 5-field cron syntax::

    ┌─────── minute (0–59)
    │ ┌───── hour (0–23)
    │ │ ┌─── day of month (1–31)
    │ │ │ ┌─ month (1–12)
    │ │ │ │ ┌ day of week (0–7, Sunday=0/7)
    │ │ │ │ │
    * * * * *

Examples: ``0 9 * * 1-5`` (9 AM Mon–Fri), ``*/15 * * * *`` (every 15 min).

get.description: List all registered schedules, optionally filtered by flow.
Retrieve a single schedule by ID.

patch.description: Pause, resume, rename, or change the cron expression of a schedule.

delete.description: Delete a schedule. The associated flow is not affected.

get.description: List dead-lettered (failed) runs, newest first.
Get a single dead-lettered run by DLQ entry ID.

delete.description: Remove a dead-lettered run from the queue.

post.description:
Replay a dead-lettered run using the original (or overridden) input.

Looks up the flow by ID and re-executes with the stored input data (or
``input_override`` if provided). Increments ``replay_count`` on the entry.
Import a template from JSON. Creates a new version if the ID already exists.

get.description:
Export a template as portable JSON with metadata.

Checks the versioned template registry first, then falls back to YAML
templates on disk.
List all versions of a template.
List all imported templates (latest version of each), optionally filtered by category.

parameters.name: category

schema.description: Filter by category: notification, data-sync, monitoring, content, devops
schema.title: Category

parameters.description: Filter by category: notification, data-sync, monitoring, content, devops

post.description:
Publish an existing flow as a marketplace template.

Snapshots the flow's nodes and edges into the template registry with
marketplace metadata (category, author).

get.description:
Search templates by name/description text and/or tags.

Results are ranked by recency (most recently imported first). All filters
are AND-combined: a template must match every supplied filter to appear.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Full-text search against name and description.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Full-text search against name and description.

get.description:
Fetch a specific template version by semver string.

Returns the latest version if the ``version`` query param is omitted.

parameters.name: version

schema.description: Semver version (e.g. '1.0.0'). Returns latest if omitted.
schema.title: Version

parameters.description: Semver version (e.g. '1.0.0'). Returns latest if omitted.

put.description:
Rollback a template to a previous semver version.

Creates a new version whose content is copied from the target version.
The new version gets the next auto-incremented semver.

post.description:
Create a new flow from a marketplace template.

Clones the template's nodes and edges into a fresh flow, re-mapping all
IDs to avoid collisions. If ``connector_overrides`` are provided, the
matching node configs are merged with the user's actual connector settings.
Run a YAML template asynchronously. Returns a task ID for polling.

get.description: Get the status and result of an async task.
List all async tasks, optionally filtered by status.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by status: pending, running, completed, failed
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, running, completed, failed

post.description:
Publish an existing flow as a marketplace listing.

Snapshots the flow's nodes and edges, scrubs credentials, and creates
a new listing entry. Returns the listing with install_count=0.

get.description: Search marketplace listings with optional filters and pagination.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Text search on name, description, and tags
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Text search on name, description, and tags

get.description:
Return admin-curated featured listings, enriched with listing metadata.

Each returned item merges the full marketplace listing data with the
featured metadata (blurb, featured_at, featured_by) and adds
``is_featured: true``.  Results are sorted by ``featured_at`` descending.

post.description:
Install a marketplace listing into the user's workspace.

Clones the listing's nodes and edges into a new flow, re-mapping all
node IDs to avoid collisions. Increments the listing's install_count.
Create an admin API key (requires master key).

get.description: List all admin API keys (requires master key). Plain keys are never returned.

delete.description: Delete (revoke) an admin API key by ID (requires master key).

post.description: Create a Fernet-encrypted managed API key with scoped permissions.

get.description: List all managed API keys with usage stats.
Get a single managed API key by ID.

delete.description: Permanently delete a managed key.

post.description: Rotate a managed key. Old key remains valid for the grace period.
Revoke (deactivate) a managed key immediately.
Create or update a flow with strict validation.

get.description: List all flows with pagination.

Search flows by name and/or tags.

- `q` — substring match on flow name (case-insensitive).
- `tag` — one or more tag values; flow must have ALL specified tags (AND logic).
- Both filters are optional; omitting both returns all flows (same as GET /flows).

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Search term matched against flow name (case-insensitive substring).
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Search term matched against flow name (case-insensitive substring).

parameters.name: tag

schema.description: Filter by tag(s). Multiple values = AND logic.
schema.title: Tag

parameters.description: Filter by tag(s). Multiple values = AND logic.

get.description: Return all flows the current user has favorited, sorted by name.
Get a flow by ID.

delete.description: Delete a flow.

put.description:
Replace a flow's nodes and edges, saving the previous version to history.

If the flow exists, its current state is snapshotted in ``FlowVersionRegistry``
before being overwritten. If it does not exist, a new flow is created (no
snapshot is taken).

get.description: Export a flow as a downloadable JSON file.

List the version history for a flow (newest first).

Each entry includes ``version_id``, ``version`` (sequential number), and
``snapshotted_at`` timestamp. Use ``GET /flows/{flow_id}/versions/{version_id}``
to retrieve the full snapshot.
Retrieve the full snapshot of a specific flow version.

post.description:
Roll back a flow to a previous version.

Snapshots the current state before applying the rollback, so the rollback
itself is also reversible.  Records an audit entry in ``rollback_audit_store``.

parameters.name: version_id

schema.description: Version ID to roll back to.
schema.title: Version Id

parameters.description: Version ID to roll back to.

get.description: List rollback audit entries for a specific flow, newest first.
List all rollback audit entries (all flows), newest first.

Compute a structural diff between two versions of a flow.

Pass the string ``"current"`` as ``version_b`` to diff against the live flow.

post.description: Import a flow from a JSON export. Assigns a new ID to avoid collisions.
Add a tag to a flow. Idempotent — adding an existing tag is a no-op.

get.description: Return all tags for a flow.

delete.description: Remove a tag from a flow. Returns 404 if the flow or tag doesn't exist.

post.description: Mark a flow as a favorite for the current user. Idempotent.

delete.description: Remove a flow from the current user's favorites. Returns 404 if not favorited.

post.description:
RESTful run creation endpoint for a flow.

Pass ``?debug=true`` to block until the run reaches a terminal state and
return the full per-node execution log inline with the response.

parameters.name: debug

schema.description: When true, poll until terminal then return execution logs inline
schema.title: Debug

parameters.description: When true, poll until terminal then return execution logs inline

post.description: Backward-compatible alias for flow execution.

get.description: List all workflow runs with pagination.
Get a workflow run by ID.
Return normalized full execution trace for a workflow run.
Return structural execution diff between two workflow runs.

Fetch the full per-node execution log for a run.

Returns an ordered list of log entries, one per event:
``node_start``, ``node_retry``, ``node_success``, ``node_fallback``, ``node_error``.
Returns 404 if the run has no recorded logs.

post.description: Re-run a previous workflow execution using original or overridden input.
Generate code suggestions using AI.

get.description: List past workflow executions with filtering by status, date range, and template name.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by status: idle, running, success, error
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by status: idle, running, success, error

parameters.name: start_after

schema.description: Filter runs started after this Unix timestamp
schema.title: Start After

parameters.description: Filter runs started after this Unix timestamp

parameters.name: start_before

schema.description: Filter runs started before this Unix timestamp
schema.title: Start Before

parameters.description: Filter runs started before this Unix timestamp

get.description: Get full execution detail for a past run, including step-by-step trace.
Service health check — returns status, version, and uptime.
Portfolio dogfood dashboard — template statuses, provider registry, health.
Detailed health check with database, providers, and last template run.
In-memory request metrics: counts, error rate, response time, provider usage.
Return current server configuration with secrets redacted.
List recent failed requests with timestamp, upstream, status code, and error.

schema.title: Response List Failed Requests Api V1 Requests Failed Get

post.description:
Re-send the original failed request internally.

The replayed request does **not** count toward the consumer's rate limit
(it is an admin/debug action).  Returns the new upstream response.

get.description:
Return the full request chain for a failed request.

Includes request headers, body, response headers, response body, and
timing.  Sensitive headers (Authorization, API keys, cookies) are
**redacted** in the output.

Return current authenticated user's execution quota status (D-13).

Shows executions consumed this hour and this month, limits, and remaining quota.

schema.title: Response Get My Execution Usage Api V1 Usage Me Get

get.description: Per-API-key usage breakdown (requests today/week/month, bandwidth, error rate).
Detailed usage for a specific consumer (by endpoint, by hour).
Show all keys with current usage vs quota, percentage consumed.

put.description: Set or clear the monthly request quota for a consumer key.

get.description: Return current API version, supported versions, and deprecated endpoints.
Per-flow execution analytics: run counts, success/error rates, avg duration.

parameters.name: flow_id

schema.description: Filter analytics to a specific flow ID.
schema.title: Flow Id

parameters.description: Filter analytics to a specific flow ID.

get.description: Per-node execution analytics: execution counts, success/error rates, avg duration.

parameters.name: flow_id

schema.description: Filter analytics to a specific flow ID.
schema.title: Flow Id

parameters.description: Filter analytics to a specific flow ID.

get.description:
Aggregated execution insights dashboard (N-33).

Returns:
- top_workflows: top 10 by execution count
- avg_duration_by_node_type: average duration per node type (ms)
- error_rate_trends: hourly error rates for the last 24 h
- peak_usage_hours: executions per hour-of-day (0–23)

Download analytics dashboard data as CSV (N-33).

Returns a multi-section CSV with top workflows and node duration data.

Health summary for all workflows (or a specific flow) in the given window.

Also evaluates all enabled alert rules against the current health data.

parameters.name: flow_id

schema.description: Filter to a specific flow ID.
schema.title: Flow Id

parameters.description: Filter to a specific flow ID.

schema.title: Response Get Monitoring Workflows Api V1 Monitoring Workflows Get

get.description:
Health detail for a single workflow.

Returns 404 if the flow has no runs in the requested window.

schema.title: Response Get Monitoring Workflow Detail Api V1 Monitoring Workflows  Flow Id  Get

post.description:
Create a new alert rule.

Required body fields: metric, operator, threshold, action_type.
Optional: workflow_id (default "*"), window_minutes (default 60), action_config (default {}).

schema.title: Response Create Alert Rule Api V1 Monitoring Alerts Post

get.description: List all alert rules.

schema.title: Response List Alert Rules Api V1 Monitoring Alerts Get

put.description: Partially update an alert rule (threshold, operator, enabled, action_config).

schema.title: Response Update Alert Rule Api V1 Monitoring Alerts  Rule Id  Put

delete.description: Delete an alert rule by id.

post.description:
Run a workflow with mock inputs and evaluate assertions against the results (N-34).

Each assertion is a string in the form ``path op value``, e.g.:
- ``status == success``
- ``output.text == Hello``
- ``output.count > 3``
- ``results.llm1.output.score >= 0.8``
- ``type(output.items) == list``

schema.title: Response Run Workflow Test Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Test Post

get.description: Return test run history for a workflow (N-34).

schema.title: Response Get Workflow Test History Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Test History Get

post.description: Save a named test suite definition for a workflow (N-34).

schema.title: Response Save Test Suite Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Test Suites Post

get.description: List saved test suite definitions for a workflow (N-34).

schema.title: Response List Test Suites Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Test Suites Get

get.description: Return all variables defined for a workflow.

put.description:
Set (replace) all variables for a workflow.

Body must be a flat JSON object of ``{key: value}`` pairs.

get.description: Return masked secret names for a workflow (values are always ``***``).

put.description:
Set (replace) all secrets for a workflow.

Body must be ``{name: plaintext_value}`` pairs. Values are encrypted at
rest and never returned in plaintext via the API.

get.description: Return the notification configuration for a workflow.

post.description: Add a threaded comment to a specific node in a workflow.

schema.title: Response Create Node Comment Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Nodes  Node Id  Comments Post

get.description: Return all comments on a specific node.

schema.title: Response List Node Comments Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Nodes  Node Id  Comments Get

get.description: Return all comments across all nodes in a flow.

schema.title: Response List Flow Comments Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Comments Get

get.description: Return the activity feed for a workflow — edits, runs, and comments.

schema.title: Response Get Workflow Activity Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Activity Get

post.description: Grant a user viewer or editor access to a workflow. Only the owner can share.

schema.title: Response Share Workflow Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Share Post

delete.description: Revoke a user's access to a workflow. Only the owner can revoke.

schema.title: Response Revoke Workflow Share Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Share  Target User Id  Delete

get.description: Return the ownership and access grants for a workflow.

schema.title: Response Get Workflow Permissions Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Permissions Get

get.description:
Return audit log entries with optional filters.

Performs lazy retention purge on each call (entries older than the
configured retention window are removed before querying).

schema.title: Response Get Audit Trail Api V1 Audit Get

post.description:
Import a workflow from an external tool (n8n or Zapier) and convert to SynApps format.

Returns the converted SynApps workflow JSON.  Pass ``save=true`` to also
persist the result as a new flow (caller becomes the owner).

schema.title: Response Import Workflow Api V1 Workflows Import Post

get.description:
Stream node-by-node execution progress as Server-Sent Events.

Replays all existing log entries for *run_id* first, then streams new
events in real-time.  Closes automatically when an ``execution_complete``
event is received.

SSE event types emitted:
- ``node_started`` — a node has begun execution
- ``node_completed`` — a node succeeded (or used fallback)
- ``node_failed`` — a node errored
- ``execution_complete`` — the workflow reached a terminal state (``data``
  includes ``status`` and optional ``error``)

post.description:
Register a new OAuth2 client application.

The ``client_secret`` is included in the response exactly once and is not
retrievable afterwards.

schema.title: Response Oauth Register Client Api V1 Oauth Clients Post

get.description: List all registered OAuth2 clients (secrets not included).

schema.title: Response Oauth List Clients Api V1 Oauth Clients Get

delete.description: Revoke (deactivate) a registered OAuth2 client.

get.description:
OAuth2 authorization endpoint (authorization_code flow).

Requires a valid user JWT in the ``Authorization: Bearer`` header to
identify the authorizing user.  Auto-approves the grant (no consent UI).

schema.title: Response Oauth Authorize Api V1 Oauth Authorize Get

post.description:
OAuth2 token endpoint supporting authorization_code and client_credentials grants.

Accepts ``application/x-www-form-urlencoded`` body (standard OAuth2).
Returns a JWT access token with ``token_type='oauth2'`` in the payload.

schema.title: Response Oauth Token Api V1 Oauth Token Post

post.description:
OAuth2 token introspection endpoint (RFC 7662).

Decodes the JWT and returns active=True with claims if valid, or
active=False if the token is invalid, expired, or not an OAuth2 token.

schema.title: Response Oauth Introspect Api V1 Oauth Introspect Post

post.description:
Validate a branch condition tree without executing it.

Performs a structural walk of the condition dict to detect:
- Unsupported node types
- Missing required keys (``type`` on every node; ``source`` / ``operation``
  on leaf nodes; ``conditions`` on and/or nodes; ``condition`` on not nodes)
- Unsupported leaf operation names

Returns ``{"valid": true}`` on success or ``{"valid": false, "error": "<message>"}``
on failure.

get.description:
List all supported leaf operations for compound condition builders.

Returns a list of operation objects, each with:
- ``name``: The operation identifier used in condition trees
- ``description``: Human-readable explanation of what the operation checks

List all workflows available to use as subflows.

Returns the same format as GET /flows but with an additional
``is_subflow_compatible: true`` flag on each entry.

schema.title: Response List Subflows Api V1 Subflows Get

post.description:
Validate that using subflow_id inside parent_flow_id would not create a cycle.

Returns ``{"valid": true, "error": null}`` when safe, or
``{"valid": false, "error": "<reason>"}`` when a circular dependency is detected.

schema.title: Response Validate Subflow Api V1 Subflows Validate Post

post.description:
Estimate the execution cost of a workflow before running it.

Args:
    flow_id: The workflow/flow ID to estimate costs for.
    body: Optional input_text used to derive rough token counts for LLM nodes.
    current_user: Authenticated user (injected by FastAPI).

Returns:
    A dict with per-node breakdown and aggregate estimated_usd.

get.description:
Return cost breakdown for a specific execution.

Returns 404 if no cost record exists for the given execution_id.
Return aggregated cost summary for all runs of a workflow.

post.description:
Replay a previous execution using its original input data.

Looks up the stored input for *execution_id*, launches a new async
execution, and registers it in the replay chain.  Returns 404 if the
execution was never recorded.

get.description:
Return the replay chain for an execution.

Returns the full ordered chain [original, replay1, replay2, ...].
If the execution has never been replayed, returns an empty chain.

post.description: Compute a structural diff between two workflow snapshots.

schema.title: Response Workflow Diff Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Diff Post

post.description: Save a workflow snapshot as a new named version.

schema.title: Response Workflow Save Version Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Versions Post

get.description: Return all version summaries for a workflow (no full snapshots).

schema.title: Response Workflow Version History Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Version History Get

get.description: Return the full snapshot record for a specific workflow version.

schema.title: Response Workflow Get Version Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Versions  Version Id  Get

get.description: Return aggregated node performance statistics for a workflow.

schema.title: Response Workflow Profile Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Profile Get

get.description: Return per-node performance profile for a single execution run.

schema.title: Response Execution Profile Api V1 Executions  Execution Id  Profile Get

post.description:
Suggest likely next-node types given the current node type.

Uses a weighted transition table derived from common workflow patterns,
adjusted by recency penalty for node types already present in the workflow.
Returns up to *limit* suggestions ordered by score descending.

Suggest node configurations from a natural-language description.

Matches keywords in *description* against known node-type vocabulary.
Returns matching node types with their default configuration templates.

get.description:
Return the built-in workflow pattern library.

Optionally filter by *tag* (case-insensitive substring match).
Each pattern includes a name, description, node sequence, and tags.

post.description:
Start a new step-through debug execution for a flow.

Creates a DebugSession and launches the debug execution as a background
task. Returns the session_id and run_id immediately so the caller can
poll GET /debug/{session_id} for state.

Args:
    flow_id: The flow to debug.
    body: input_data and list of breakpoint node IDs.
    current_user: Authenticated user (injected by FastAPI).

Returns:
    JSON with session_id, run_id, status, and breakpoints.

schema.title: Response Start Debug Session Api V1 Workflows  Flow Id  Debug Post

get.description:
Return the current state of a debug session.

Args:
    session_id: The debug session to query.
    current_user: Authenticated user.

Returns:
    Full session state dict including execution history.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404: When session_id is not found.

schema.title: Response Get Debug Session Api V1 Debug  Session Id  Get

delete.description:
Abort a debug session, stopping the background execution task.

Sets status to "aborted" and signals the resume event so the background
task can detect the abort and exit cleanly.

Args:
    session_id: The debug session to abort.
    current_user: Authenticated user.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404: When session_id is not found.

post.description:
Resume execution from a breakpoint.

Signals the paused background task to continue to the next node (or next
breakpoint). If the session is not currently paused the call is a no-op
that still returns 200.

Args:
    session_id: The debug session to resume.
    current_user: Authenticated user.

Returns:
    Updated session state.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404: When session_id is not found.

schema.title: Response Debug Continue Api V1 Debug  Session Id  Continue Post

post.description:
Skip the currently paused node and resume execution.

The paused node's output is recorded as an empty dict and marked
``skipped=True`` in the execution history.

Args:
    session_id: The debug session in which to skip the current node.
    current_user: Authenticated user.

Returns:
    Updated session state.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404: When session_id is not found.

schema.title: Response Debug Skip Api V1 Debug  Session Id  Skip Post

post.description:
Replace the breakpoint set for a debug session.

The new list takes effect immediately: the next node evaluated against the
breakpoint set will see the updated collection.

Args:
    session_id: The debug session to update.
    body: New breakpoints list (replaces existing set).
    current_user: Authenticated user.

Returns:
    Updated session state.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404: When session_id is not found.

schema.title: Response Update Debug Breakpoints Api V1 Debug  Session Id  Breakpoints Post

get.description:
Return trending marketplace listings (no auth required).

Trending score = recent installs (last 7 days) × 10 + all-time install_count.

schema.title: Response Get Trending Listings Api V1 Marketplace Trending Get

get.description: Return the publisher's own listings with rating and review stats.

schema.title: Response Publisher Dashboard Api V1 Marketplace Publisher Dashboard Get

post.description: Submit or update a star rating for a marketplace listing.

schema.title: Response Rate Listing Api V1 Marketplace  Listing Id  Rate Post

post.description: Submit a text review for a marketplace listing.

schema.title: Response Add Review Api V1 Marketplace  Listing Id  Review Post

get.description:
List reviews for a marketplace listing (no auth required).

Each review includes a ``reply`` field containing the publisher's reply

schema.title: Response List Reviews Api V1 Marketplace  Listing Id  Reviews Get

post.description: Submit a publisher reply to a review (auth required).

schema.title: Response Reply To Review Api V1 Marketplace Reviews  Review Id  Reply Post

post.description: Report an issue with a marketplace listing (auth required).

schema.title: Response Report Issue Api V1 Marketplace  Listing Id  Report Post

get.description: Return credit summary for the authenticated publisher.

schema.title: Response Publisher Credits Api V1 Marketplace Publisher Credits Get

get.description: Return ledger entries for the authenticated publisher.

schema.title: Response Publisher Credits Ledger Api V1 Marketplace Publisher Credits Ledger Get

get.description: Return full payout report including per-listing breakdown.

schema.title: Response Publisher Payout Report Api V1 Marketplace Publisher Credits Payout Report Get

post.description: Request a credit payout. Returns updated balance.

schema.title: Response Publisher Payout Api V1 Marketplace Publisher Credits Payout Post

put.description: Create or update an SLA policy for a workflow.

schema.title: Response Set Sla Policy Api V1 Sla Policies  Flow Id  Put

get.description: Get the SLA policy for a workflow.

schema.title: Response Get Sla Policy Api V1 Sla Policies  Flow Id  Get

delete.description: Delete the SLA policy for a workflow.

get.description: List all SLA policies owned by the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response List Sla Policies Api V1 Sla Policies Get

get.description: List SLA violations for the authenticated user, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Sla Violations Api V1 Sla Violations Get

get.description: Return SLA compliance statistics for the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Sla Dashboard Api V1 Sla Dashboard Get

post.description: Mark a marketplace listing as admin-curated featured (admin only).

delete.description: Remove a marketplace listing from the featured list (admin only).

get.description: Return autocomplete suggestions matching prefix of listing names or tags.

post.description: Estimate execution cost for an arbitrary list of nodes (before flow is saved).
Estimate execution cost for a saved flow.

post.description:
Join a flow's collaboration session.

Registers the current user's presence and records a 'joined' activity event.
Returns the user's assigned color and the current list of collaborators.

schema.title: Response Collaboration Join Api V1 Flows  Flow Id  Collaboration Join Post

delete.description:
Leave a flow's collaboration session.

Removes the user's presence, releases all held node locks,
and records a 'left' activity event.

schema.title: Response Collaboration Leave Api V1 Flows  Flow Id  Collaboration Leave Delete

post.description: Update the authenticated user's last-seen timestamp for presence.

schema.title: Response Collaboration Heartbeat Api V1 Flows  Flow Id  Collaboration Heartbeat Post

get.description: Return the list of collaborators currently active on a flow.

schema.title: Response Collaboration Presence Api V1 Flows  Flow Id  Collaboration Presence Get

post.description:
Acquire an optimistic lock on a workflow node.

Returns 200 if the lock was acquired, 409 if already locked by another user.

schema.title: Response Collaboration Lock Acquire Api V1 Flows  Flow Id  Collaboration Lock  Node Id  Post

delete.description: Release an optimistic lock on a workflow node.

schema.title: Response Collaboration Lock Release Api V1 Flows  Flow Id  Collaboration Lock  Node Id  Delete

get.description: Return all active node locks for a flow.

schema.title: Response Collaboration Locks Api V1 Flows  Flow Id  Collaboration Locks Get

get.description: Return the most recent 20 activity events for a flow.

schema.title: Response Collaboration Activity Api V1 Flows  Flow Id  Collaboration Activity Get

EstimateCostRequest.description: Request body for estimating cost of arbitrary nodes.

FlowEstimateCostRequest.description: Request body for estimating cost of a saved flow.

FlowNodeRequest.title: FlowNodeRequest

FlowUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating (replacing) an existing flow.

ImportFlowRequest.title: ImportFlowRequest
ImportFlowRequest.description: Request body for importing a flow.

format.title: Format
format.description: Source format: 'n8n' or 'zapier'. Auto-detected if omitted.

data.title: Data
data.description: Raw workflow JSON from the source tool.

save.title: Save
save.description: If true, persist the converted workflow to the flow store.

flow_name.title: Flow Name
flow_name.description: Name for the new flow. Defaults to listing name.

connector_overrides.title: Connector Overrides
connector_overrides.description: Map of node IDs to connector config overrides.

flow_name.title: Flow Name

connector_overrides.title: Connector Overrides
connector_overrides.description: Map of node IDs to connector config overrides.

InstantiateTemplateRequest.title: InstantiateTemplateRequest
InstantiateTemplateRequest.description: Request body for instantiating a flow from a template.

expires_in.title: Expires In
expires_in.description: Seconds until expiry (min 60s, max 1 year). Omit for no expiry.

ManagedKeyCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a managed API key.

OAuthClientRegisterRequest.title: OAuthClientRegisterRequest
OAuthClientRegisterRequest.description: Request body for registering a new OAuth2 client.

flow_id.description: ID of the existing flow to publish

category.title: Category
category.description: One of: notification, data-sync, monitoring, content, devops

PublishTemplateRequest.description: Request body for publishing a flow as a marketplace template.
